subject: Prague
body:
Hi
My father saw this apartment and he said it was the
best one so far.
The building is under complete reconstruction and
should be finished in march 2008.
He thought the best way would be to connect two of the
apartmens but that is quite expensive. There are nice 
views of the river from one side and the Petrin castle
from the other. 
It is opposite the national theter which is a good
location also very close to the main street.
It will have an elevator, a  reception desk and
parking and cellars are available.

I do not have the pictures he took yet, I will send
themto you when I do.


Love you



      ____________________________________________________________________________________
Be a better pen pal. 
Text or chat with friends inside Yahoo! Mail. See how.  http://overview.mail.yahoo.com/
